  "claims": [
    "After 17 years and $13.7 billion spent, no tracks have been laid for the California High-Speed Rail project.",
    "Taxpayers are spending a billion dollars a year on the California High-Speed Rail project.",
    "Residents in Southern California are suffering from the aftermath of wildfires, including life-threatening flooding.",
    "People in the Central Valley do not have access to drinkable water.",
    "The annual funding of $1 billion for the High-Speed Rail project could be better used for wildfire prevention and water infrastructure projects.",
